title: Ο περί Καταργήσεως των περί Ειδικών Δικαστηρίων Νόμων, Νόμος του 1960 (A9/1960)

provisions.title: Άρθρο 1: Short title and commencement
provisions.content: 1. This Law may be cited as the Special Court Laws (Repeal) Law, 1960, and shall come into operation on the 27th July, 1960.

provisions.title: Άρθρο 2: Repeal
provisions.content: 2. The Special Court Laws, 1955 to 1959, are hereby repealed.
